perturbation.original_text: The term “Confidential Information” does not include any information which (a) at the time of disclosure or thereafter is generally available to or known by the public (other than as a result of its disclosure by you or your Representatives in breach of this Agreement), (b) was available to you or your Representatives on a non-confidential basis prior to disclosure by the Company, (c) becomes available to you or your Representatives on a non-confidential basis from a Person who is not known by you or your Representatives (as applicable) to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with the Company, or is not otherwise prohibited from transmitting the information to you or your Representatives (as applicable), or (d) is or was independently developed by you or your Representatives without reference to, incorporation of, or other use of any Confidential Information.
perturbation.changed_text: The term “Confidential Information” includes any information which (a) at the time of disclosure or thereafter is generally available to or known by the public (other than as a result of its disclosure by you or your Representatives in breach of this Agreement), (b) was available to you or your Representatives on a non-confidential basis prior to disclosure by the Company, (c) becomes available to you or your Representatives on a non-confidential basis from a Person who is not known by you or your Representatives (as applicable) to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with the Company, or is not otherwise prohibited from transmitting the information to you or your Representatives (as applicable), or (d) is or was independently developed by you or your Representatives without reference to, incorporation of, or other use of any Confidential Information.
perturbation.explanation: This change flips the definition of 'Confidential Information' to *include* publicly available, previously known, or independently developed information. This directly contradicts the original definition, especially when considered in conjunction with Section 1, which states the Confidential Information will be kept confidential. Now, the agreement requires keeping public information confidential, which is logically impossible, or at least, create an In-Text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You hereby agree that the Confidential Information will be used solely for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction and that such information will be kept confidential by you; provided that any such information may be disclosed to your officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources (such Persons hereinafter collectively being referred to as your “ Representatives ” who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction, have been informed of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, and have been advised that such information is to be kept confidential, and provided , further , that such officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources shall always be deemed to be your Representatives regardless if you furnish Confidential Information to them or not. You agree you will be liable for any breaches of the terms of this Agreement by such Representatives.
perturbation.justification: The original text defines 'Confidential Information' to exclude publicly available or independently developed information. The changed text flips this definition to include such information. The 'Contradicted Text' states that 'Confidential Information' must be kept confidential. If 'Confidential Information' now includes publicly available information, then the agreement requires keeping public information confidential, which is impossible and contradictory. This is a direct conflict as defined by the Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction definition.

perturbation.original_text: Given the nature of the Confidential Information and our current discussions, the Company may be irreparably damaged by any unauthorized disclosure of any Confidential Information and you and the Company may be irreparably damaged by any unauthorized disclosure of our discussions or by any breach of this Agreement by you, the Company or the Representatives of you and the Company. Without prejudice to other rights and remedies otherwise available, you and the Company therefore agree that the other party hereto shall be entitled to seek equitable relief, including an injunction or specific performance, in the event of any breach of the provisions of this Agreement by the other party hereto or the Representatives of the other party hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: Given the nature of the Confidential Information and our current discussions, the Company may be irreparably damaged by any unauthorized disclosure of any Confidential Information and you and the Company may be irreparably damaged by any unauthorized disclosure of our discussions or by any breach of this Agreement by you, the Company or the Representatives of you and the Company. Without prejudice to other rights and remedies otherwise available, you and the Company therefore agree that neither party hereto shall be entitled to seek equitable relief, including an injunction or specific performance, in the event of any breach of the provisions of this Agreement by the other party hereto or the Representatives of the other party hereto.
perturbation.explanation: This change removes the right to seek equitable relief (injunction, specific performance) for breaches of the agreement. This directly contradicts the original statement, which established the entitlement to equitable relief. Given the statement in section 1 about keeping confidential information and being liable for breaches of the terms of this Agreement by such Representatives, this change could potentially conflict the liability of the first party with the enforcement of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You hereby agree that the Confidential Information will be used solely for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction and that such information will be kept confidential by you; provided that any such information may be disclosed to your officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources (such Persons hereinafter collectively being referred to as your “ Representatives ” who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction, have been informed of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, and have been advised that such information is to be kept confidential, and provided , further , that such officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources shall always be deemed to be your Representatives regardless if you furnish Confidential Information to them or not. You agree you will be liable for any breaches of the terms of this Agreement by such Representatives.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly states that both parties are entitled to seek equitable relief for breaches. The changed text removes this entitlement, stating that neither party can seek equitable relief. The contradicted text holds the first party liable for breaches by their Representatives. Removing the ability to seek equitable relief directly contradicts the enforcement mechanism implicitly available in the contradicted section, as the ability to seek an injunction to prevent further breaches by the Representatives is now unavailable. This creates a direct conflict and uncertainty, as one section creates liability, while another removes a means to enforce it.

perturbation.original_text: In the event you or any of your Representatives become legally compelled (by deposition, interrogatory, request for documents, subpoena, civil investigation, demand, order or similar process) to disclose any of the contents of the Confidential Information, or you or the Company or any of the respective Representatives of you or the Company become so legally compelled to disclose either the fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place concerning a possible Transaction between the Company and you, or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such possible Transaction, including the status thereof, the Company and you each agrees that each party and its respective Representatives may do so without liability, but each party hereto also agrees (i) to promptly notify the other party prior to any such disclosure to the extent practicable and legally permissible and (ii) to cooperate with the other party in any attempt it may make to obtain a protective order or other appropriate assurance that confidential treatment will be afforded the Confidential Information.
perturbation.changed_text: In the event you or any of your Representatives become legally compelled (by deposition, interrogatory, request for documents, subpoena, civil investigation, demand, order or similar process) to disclose any of the contents of the Confidential Information, or you or the Company or any of the respective Representatives of you or the Company become so legally compelled to disclose either the fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place concerning a possible Transaction between the Company and you, or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such possible Transaction, including the status thereof, the Company and you each agrees that each party and its respective Representatives may do so and shall be liable, but each party hereto also agrees (i) to promptly notify the other party prior to any such disclosure to the extent practicable and legally permissible and (ii) to cooperate with the other party in any attempt it may make to obtain a protective order or other appropriate assurance that confidential treatment will be afforded the Confidential Information.
perturbation.explanation: This change adds liability when the parties are legally compelled to disclose information. This directly contradicts the original text, which explicitly states that disclosure under legal compulsion is *without liability*. Considering the first definition, the liability of each party with a legal process could contradict with being a representation. The change adds an additional factor the first party should consider, which wasn't in the original text.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In the event you or any of your Representatives become legally compelled (by deposition, interrogatory, request for documents, subpoena, civil investigation, demand, order or similar process) to disclose any of the contents of the Confidential Information, or you or the Company or any of the respective Representatives of you or the Company become so legally compelled to disclose either the fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place concerning a possible Transaction between the Company and you, or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such possible Transaction, including the status thereof, the Company and you each agrees that each party and its respective Representatives may do so and shall be liable, but each party hereto also agrees (i) to promptly notify the other party prior to any such disclosure to the extent practicable and legally permissible and (ii) to cooperate with the other party in any attempt it may make to obtain a protective order or other appropriate assurance that confidential treatment will be afforded the Confidential Information.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that there is no liability if either party is compelled to disclose confidential information. The changed text explicitly states that there *shall* be liability under the same circumstances. This creates a direct contradiction, as it goes from a state of no liability to one where liability exists for the exact same action. This directly contradicts the initial statement in the paragraph, as it imposes liability when originally there was none. Thus, based on the Perturbation Explanation and comparing it to the Contradicted Text, a strong contradiction exists.

perturbation.original_text: Following any written request by the Company, you agree, at the Company’s election, to either promptly redeliver to the Company or destroy all written Confidential Information in your possession or your Representatives’ possession, and you and your Representatives will not retain any copies, extracts or other reproductions in whole or in part of such written material. You further agree that all documents, memoranda, notes and other writings whatsoever prepared by you or your Representatives based on the Confidential Information shall be destroyed, and you shall delete, to the extent reasonably practicable, all Confidential Information from any computer or other electronic device. Notwithstanding the foregoing, no such destruction or deletion shall be 2 required where prohibited by law, regulation, regulatory process or proceeding, or stock exchange regulation, or where the Confidential Information is part of the record of proceedings of your Board of Directors; provided , that any such Confidential Information so retained shall continue to be held confidential in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Following any written request by the Company, you agree, at the Company’s election, to either promptly redeliver to the Company or destroy all written Confidential Information in your possession or your Representatives’ possession, and you and your Representatives will retain any copies, extracts or other reproductions in whole or in part of such written material. You further agree that all documents, memoranda, notes and other writings whatsoever prepared by you or your Representatives based on the Confidential Information shall not be destroyed, and you shall not delete, to the extent reasonably practicable, all Confidential Information from any computer or other electronic device. Notwithstanding the foregoing, no such destruction or deletion shall be 2 required where prohibited by law, regulation, regulatory process or proceeding, or stock exchange regulation, or where the Confidential Information is part of the record of proceedings of your Board of Directors; provided , that any such Confidential Information so retained shall continue to be held confidential in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This change forces the retaining of copies and documents instead of destroying. This contradicts the original requirement to destroy the data and not retaining copies. The confidential information definition of section 2, being a flipped definition, this could be also creating a contradiction with this section. This changes the initial requirements to the first party and the processes that should follow.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Following any written request by the Company, you agree, at the Company’s election, to either promptly redeliver to the Company or destroy all written Confidential Information in your possession or your Representatives’ possession, and you and your Representatives will retain any copies, extracts or other reproductions in whole or in part of such written material. You further agree that all documents, memoranda, notes and other writings whatsoever prepared by you or your Representatives based on the Confidential Information shall not be destroyed, and you shall not delete, to the extent reasonably practicable, all Confidential Information from any computer or other electronic device. Notwithstanding the foregoing, no such destruction or deletion shall be 2 required where prohibited by law, regulation, regulatory process or proceeding, or stock exchange regulation, or where the Confidential Information is part of the record of proceedings of your Board of Directors; provided , that any such Confidential Information so retained shall continue to be held confidential in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original text by mandating the retention of confidential information and documents instead of their destruction, as initially required. The contradicted text is a copy of the changed text, showcasing how the change reverses the initial obligation. This change creates a clear contradiction within the document, making the obligation ambiguous and unenforceable.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement represents the entire understanding and agreement of the parties hereto and may be modified only by a separate written agreement executed by you and the Company expressly modifying this Agreement. This Agreement supersedes and cancels any and all prior agreements between the parties hereto, express or implied, relating to the Transaction; provided that the Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement dated as of November 13, 2009 between the parties hereto 4 shall remain in full force and effect with respect to the matters contemplated thereby.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement represents the entire understanding and agreement of the parties hereto and may be modified by an oral agreement between you and a Representative of the company. This Agreement supersedes and cancels any and all prior agreements between the parties hereto, express or implied, relating to the Transaction; provided that the Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement dated as of November 13, 2009 between the parties hereto 4 shall remain in full force and effect with respect to the matters contemplated thereby.
perturbation.explanation: This change allows oral modifications and agreements with Representatives of the company, instead of a written agreement between both parties. This contradicts the prior statement that the Agreement represents the entire understanding and agreement between the parties, and also contradicts with the first definition, about the representative, because a verbal agreement can be done with every single representative, or the other party, which creates a contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You hereby agree that the Confidential Information will be used solely for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction and that such information will be kept confidential by you; provided that any such information may be disclosed to your officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources (such Persons hereinafter collectively being referred to as your “ Representatives ” who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction, have been informed of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, and have been advised that such information is to be kept confidential, and provided , further , that such officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources shall always be deemed to be your Representatives regardless if you furnish Confidential Information to them or not. You agree you will be liable for any breaches of the terms of this Agreement by such Representatives.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that the agreement can only be modified by a written agreement executed by both parties. The changed text now allows for modifications via oral agreement with a company representative. The contradicted text discusses the confidentiality of information shared with representatives, making you liable for their breaches. The change now creates a contradiction because a verbal agreement with 'any' representative of the company could impact the confidential information that the representatives are exposed to in the contradicted text. This is in direct conflict with the original text's clause, and makes the liability assigned in the contradicted text harder to enforce, therefore, it is a strong contradiction, based on Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction definition.
